news.title: On Bond Street, falling yields spur a Rs 17,000-crore fundraise
news.description: Indian institutions secured over ₹17,000 crore via bond sales as falling benchmark yields made borrowing cheaper. news.title: Rupee ends losing run on whiff of FPI flows into stocks
news.description: The Indian rupee strengthened on Friday, ending its four-day decline to close at 94.21 against the dollar. news.title: SGB redemption July 2026: 8 Sovereign Gold Bond series eligible for early exit
news.description: Investors holding eligible Sovereign Gold Bond (SGB) tranches can opt for premature redemption after completing the mandatory five-year holding period.

news.title: India’s services sector growth hits 17-month low in June on softer domestic demand: PMI
news.description: India's services sector growth fell to a 17-month low in June as challenging market conditions and reduced client interest for some services reportedly stymied total sales and output, a monthly survey said on Friday.
